holdings.infoBox: MAVF is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 8.04%, Microsoft at 6.75%, Apple at 6.37%, Amazon.com at 5.29%, and Generac Holdings at 5.27%.

overview.description: The Matrix Advisors Value ETF (MAVF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns through investments in undervalued US large-cap companies with financial strength, sustainable cash flow generation, and attractive valuation metrics. MAVF was launched on Sep 16, 1983 and is issued by Matrix.
